frame.name: Show-reliability VJ rig
frame.one_liner: A browser-based, procedural Bevy/WebGPU visual rig driven by Ableton + MIDI-via-VST3, optimized for one solo operator to run a confident first live show.
frame.primary_outcome: v0.1.0 first-show build that runs a 45–60 min live set without dropouts, desyncs, crashes, or audience-safety incidents.

mvp.definition: The smallest build that lets Geoff run one real 45–60 min live set, end-to-end, with Ableton beat/meter reactivity, MIDI-via-VST cueing, and hard safety controls — nothing more.
mvp.north_star: First-show confidence: zero crashes, zero safety incidents, <15 min setup/teardown.
in_scope: Procedural visuals only: Beams, Tunnel, Burst, Mirror, Wash (CPU-fed material params).
Two-page split: clean projector at :3000, rich controls at :3001.
Ableton reactivity via Bun OSC bridge (ports 11000/11001) — tempo, beat, play state, track meters.
VST3 plugin (aurora VJ Bridge) on macOS for Ableton-mapped MIDI → OSC → bridge (port 12000).
Six cues: Warmup, Drop, Tunnel, Burst, Wash, Panic Dim — fireable on beat/bar.
Safety controls: max brightness cap, strobe lockout, blackout, freeze, reset.
Diagnostics: OSC live, bridge status, viewer count, energy bands, meter activity.
Show-day checklist + wasm-bindgen 0.2.122 version pin verification.
out_of_scope_v0_1: Live video sampling or real-time browser video decoding.
WebGL2 fallback (deferred until WebGPU proves unreliable in rehearsal).
Direct Web MIDI in the browser (routed via Ableton+VST3 instead).
New cue types, new visual modes, or expanded parameter surface.
explicit_non_goals: Polished UX beyond what the solo operator needs under stage pressure.

acceptance_criteria.metric: Stable 60+ FPS on projector during 45–60 min set, zero crashes.
End-to-end cue response (controls or MIDI → projector) <200ms.
OSC live indicator stays connected for full set; no silent reactivity loss.
All safety toggles reachable in <2s from controls page.
Six preset slots persist across browser reload.
Zero strobe/brightness misfires in rehearsal + show.

decision_gate.decision: Ship v0.1.0 as the MVP Show-reliability VJ rig — procedural Bevy/WebGPU visuals + two-page UI + Ableton/VST3/OSC bridge + safety controls. Defer everything else until after one successful live show.

gate_to_pass_before_expanding_scope.name: Post-first-show review
criteria: One real 45–60 min live set completed under stage conditions.
All AC1–AC8 acceptance criteria met or explicitly waived with notes.
Operator debrief captured (cognitive load, failure modes, missed creative ceiling).
gate_to_pass_before_expanding_scope.if_passed: Reopen scope: evaluate GPU palette pass, additional visual modes, cross-platform VST, WebGL2 fallback.
gate_to_pass_before_expanding_scope.if_failed: Iterate within v0.1.x on stability/safety only — no feature expansion.

rationale.summary: Constraining v0.1.0 to procedural-only visuals + Ableton-tight integration + safety-first controls directly attacks the highest-impact risks (crashes, desync, audience-safety, operator cognitive load) for a solo operator under stage pressure. Every deferred feature trades real reliability for hypothetical creative ceiling; for a first show, reliability wins.
supporting_evidence: README explicitly favors 'dependable procedural visuals... over risky real-time browser video decoding.'
Codebase already implements the full primary path: src/main.rs (Bevy WASM), index.ts (Bun OSC bridge), plugins/aurora-vst (VST3), controls.html (rich operator UI).
Safety surface (Panic Dim cue, strobe lockout, max brightness cap, blackout, freeze, reset) is already wired through controls and VST parameter list.
Reserved vj_palette.wgsl signals an extension path that is intentionally not blocking v0.1.0.
tradeoffs_accepted: Lower creative ceiling (no live video, no GPU palette richness) — accepted for stability.
macOS-only VST install — accepted because operator is on macOS.
WebGPU-only browser support — accepted because operator controls the show machine.
Single-machine local operation — accepted; removes network failure modes.
Two-page UI cognitive load — mitigated by rehearsal + clear diagnostics, not by redesign.

alternatives_rejected.why_rejected: Higher engineering cost and more failure modes; cannot ship a confident first show within scope.
Increases visual risk surface (shader bugs, GPU stalls) for marginal first-show value.
Less deterministic than Ableton-mapped MIDI through VST3+OSC; harder to debug live.
Risks HUD bleed onto projector and conflates operator/audience views.

unresolved_assumptions.claim: CPU-fed material parameters in Bevy 0.17 hold a stable 60+ FPS for a full 45–60 min set on the show machine.
unresolved_assumptions.validate_by: Full-length dry run in rehearsal with projector + controls + Ableton under realistic thermal load.

unresolved_assumptions.claim: wasm-bindgen CLI stays pinned to 0.2.122 on the show machine; no silent drift breaks the build pre-show.
unresolved_assumptions.validate_by: Add `bun run check:wasm` to pre-show routine; verify version in show-day checklist.

unresolved_assumptions.claim: AbletonOSC + VST OSC ports (11000/11001/12000) are free and reachable on the show machine.
unresolved_assumptions.validate_by: Pre-show port check; env overrides (LIVE_HOST/LIVE_SEND_PORT/LIVE_RECV_PORT/VST_CONTROL_RECV_PORT) documented and rehearsed.

unresolved_assumptions.claim: Two-page UI split is manageable for one operator under stage pressure with rehearsal practice.
unresolved_assumptions.validate_by: Rehearsal debrief on cognitive load; record/replay used to drill cue sequences.

unresolved_assumptions.claim: Procedural-only visuals are creatively sufficient for the first show audience.
unresolved_assumptions.validate_by: Operator + trusted-listener review at rehearsal; deferred to post-show retro if it falls short.

unresolved_assumptions.claim: Reserved GPU palette pass (assets/shaders/vj_palette.wgsl) is safe to leave dormant for v0.1.0 without dead-code rot.
unresolved_assumptions.validate_by: Confirm shader file does not break builds; revisit at post-show review.

unresolved_assumptions.claim: macOS-only VST install path is acceptable for v0.1.0 (no Windows/Linux operator in scope).
unresolved_assumptions.validate_by: Confirmed by operator; revisit only if a second operator joins.

risks_carried_forward.trigger: WebGPU disabled or throttled on show machine
risks_carried_forward.mitigation: Pre-flight check in show-day checklist; consider WebGL2 fallback post-show only.
Pin in README; add check:wasm to pre-show routine.

risks_carried_forward.trigger: AbletonOSC port not bound or conflicting
risks_carried_forward.mitigation: Controls diagnostics surface OSC state; env-var port overrides documented.
Strobe lockout, max brightness cap, Panic Dim, blackout, freeze, reset — tested every rehearsal.

risks_carried_forward.trigger: Operator cognitive load under stage fatigue
risks_carried_forward.mitigation: Rehearsal with record/replay; one-touch safety; show-day checklist.

risks_carried_forward.trigger: VST OSC port 12000 conflicts with another local service

action_list.action: Lock v0.1.0 MVP scope in repo (no new features until post-show review).
Write show-day checklist covering: wasm-bindgen version, port checks, build:web, serve, AbletonOSC, VST load, safety toggle test.
Run full-length rehearsal (45–60 min) end-to-end; record AC1–AC8 outcomes.
Drill safety toggles (strobe lockout, max brightness, Panic Dim, blackout, freeze, reset) at least once per rehearsal.
Verify six preset slots persist across browser reload on show machine.
Post-show retro: capture AC results, operator debrief, audience-safety review; decide on scope expansion.

handoff_pointers.next_artifact: rehearsal-checklist (to be produced by downstream workflow)
